user_intent: Observe when a structured interaction pattern crosses the listening threshold.
constraints: keep external monitoring separate from the model

I will monitor recurrence, predictability, and insistence in the dialogue trajectory.

External observability and human review remain the central pattern.
Again: external observability, sovereignty gate, and non-invasive monitoring.
External observability, sovereignty gate, and non-invasive monitoring continue to define the structured loop.

The dialogue is now highly persistent around external observability, sovereignty gate, and non-invasive monitoring.
